song_name: Maroon 5 - Memories - Sonu Nigam - Kal Ho Na Ho
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Memories + Kal Ho Na Ho

[ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
[ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]
Here's to the ones that we got[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch]
Cheers to the wish you were here, but you're not[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause the drinks bring back all the memories of everything we've been through[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
Toast to the ones here today[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch]
Toast to the ones that we lost on the way[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
'Cause the drinks bring back all the memories[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]          N.C.
And the memories bring back memories, bring back you...[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
There's a time that I remember, when I did not know no pain[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
When I believed in forever, and everything would stay the same[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]
Now my heart feel like December, when somebody say your name[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause I can't reach out to call you, but I know I will one day, ay[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
   Everybody hurts sometimes, everybody hurts someday, ay-ay[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
   Everything will be alright, go and raise a glass and say, hey[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]
Here's to the ones that we got[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch]
Cheers to the wish you were here, but you're not[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause the drinks bring back all the memories of everything we've been through[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
Toast to ones here today[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch]
Toast to the ones that we lost on the way[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
'Cause the drinks bring back all the memories[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]          N.C.
And the memories bring back memories, bring back you...[/tab]


[Break]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]
  Do do, do do do do, do,   do do do do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
Do do do, do   do do do do, do do do[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
Memories bring back memories, bring back you...[/tab]


Kal Ho Na Ho

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Dm7[/ch]
 Chaahe jo tumhe poore dil se[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
 Milta hai voh mushkil se[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Dm7[/ch]
 Aisa jo koi kahin hai[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Dm7[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
 Bas vohi sab se haseen hai[/tab]

[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
Us haath ko tum thaam lo[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
Voh meherbaan kal ho naa ho[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
Har pal yahan jeebhar jiyo[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]Am9[/ch]
Har ghadi badal rahi hai roop zindagi[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]Am9[/ch]
